qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate degree OR Graduate degree + 3 years of relevant experience.
qualification.details: Assistant Project Manager: Post graduate degree Graduate degree + 3 years of relevant experience. Three years working experience in the Office Management preferably in Hostel Office. Candidates should have a good knowledge of computer applications. Experience in handling students matters. Experience of interacting with parents of students. The candidate should have at-least 3 years of experience for handling various accounts, maintaining cash books, stock register, ledgers & preparation of BRS etc. Candidates should have a good knowledge of financial accounting package i.e. Tally, ERP-9 Package etc.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Project Manager post at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Assistant Project Manager position at IIT Kanpur is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Project Manager role?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Assistant Project Manager post announced by IIT Kanpur in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Project Manager position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a postgraduate degree or a graduate degree with at least 3 years of relevant experience to be eligible for the Assistant Project Manager role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for the Assistant Project Manager position at IIT Kanpur must be submitted through email only.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Project Manager post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Assistant Project Manager position is in the range of Rs. 16000 to Rs. 38000, with an increment of Rs. 1300.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Assistant Project Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Assistant Project Manager post will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Assistant Project Manager recruitment at IIT Kanpur is P.Rect./R&D/2026/123.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of experience is preferred for the Assistant Project Manager role?
faq.answer: Preference is given to candidates with three years of working experience in Office Management, preferably in a Hostel Office, and knowledge of computer applications and financial accounting packages.

faq.question: Q10. Where should I send my application for the Assistant Project Manager post?
faq.answer: Your detailed CV and self-attested copies of documents should be sent via email to [email protected] with the subject line "Application for the post of APM vide Advt. No. P.Rect./R&D/2026/123".
